commentaries.author: Clement Of Alexandria
commentaries.content: This, I think, is signified by the utterance of the Saviour, "The foxes have holes, but the Son of man hath not where to lay His head."

commentaries.author: Tertullian of Carthage
commentaries.content: That Lord walked in humility and obscurity, with no definite home: for "the Son of man "said He, "hath not where to lay His head; "
